data.title: Laboratory Director - AtoG Labs
data.raw_snippet:
**Laboratory Director – AtoG Labs****Location:** Dubai, UAE  

**Reports to:** Board of Directors

**About AtoG Labs:**  

AtoG Labs is a high\-technology molecular diagnostics and genetics laboratory dedicated to advancing personalized medicine in the UAE and beyond. Our multidisciplinary expertise covers molecular biology, genetic sequencing, oncology biomarkers, infectious disease testing, and women’s health diagnostics. data.title: Chief Financial Officer
data.company: Trilogy Fab Trailers Manufacturing One Owner Company L. L. C
data.raw_snippet:
The CFO will lead the company’s financial strategy and operations, with a strong focus on project\-based financial management, profitability, and compliance within the UAE contracting sector.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Oversee financial planning, budgeting, and forecasting
* Manage project costing, cash flow, and working capital
* Ensure UAE VAT and regulatory compliance
* Monitor contract revenue, costs, and variations

data.title: Head of Department – Pediatrics (American Board, Arabic Speaker) - Qatar
data.raw_snippet:
Position Overview
  
A prestigious healthcare institution in Qatar is seeking a highly qualified Head of Department for Pediatrics to lead its pediatric division. The ideal candidate must be American Board Certified in Pediatrics and fluent in Arabic, with a strong background in clinical leadership, multidisciplinary collaboration, and patient\-centered care.
